title: Promotional Headroom
description: product-spec.md §11.12, §13.9, §15.7. Headroom is the distance between the current or recommended list price and the minimum safe promotional list price, partitioned into reserves.

reference_list_price.description: The price headroom is measured from -- current list, or the recommended price for the selected strategy.

reserves.description: Partition of max_safe_discount (config/assumptions/discounting.yaml). Emergency markdown requires manager approval per §22.2.

max_accounting_discount.description: Discount to the accounting break-even list equivalent.

max_safe_discount.description: reference_list_price - minimum_safe_list_price. Exceeding this raises a BLOCKING warning.

economically_sensible_discount.description: Found by re-simulating the vehicle at each rung of the discount ladder and taking the argmax of P50 net economic value -- not by formula. Slot opportunity cost IS included here (D3), because this is an economic optimization rather than a floor.

used_headroom.description: original_list_price - current_list_price. Cumulative markdown already taken.

ladder.description: The evaluated discount ladder, retained so the chosen rung is auditable rather than asserted.
